desc_1: Engineer, creator, and builder. I design and ship products end-to-end across frontend, backend, and cloud infrastructure.
desc_2: I build fast, accessible experiences and care deeply about product quality.
desc_3: Currently open to consulting, collaborations, and product engineering roles.

bullets: Built a multi-region event processing backbone handling 400M+ jobs/day
Cut incident recovery time by 62% through trace-based alerting and runbook automation
Designed service-to-service auth and policy enforcement across 120+ microservices
Migrated core scheduling engine to Go, reducing p95 latency from 480ms to 140ms
Shipped dispatch APIs powering same-day routing in 40+ cities
Implemented canary deployment workflow that dropped rollback rate by 35%
